positive: A stylized, abstract celestial fox spirit, depicted in a vibrant crimson and midnight blue color palette. The fox has flowing, ethereal fur and is surrounded by crystalline cosmic dust and swirling nebula gas. The composition is centrally focused, featuring clean, bold silhouettes against a deep, starry background. Use an ink-wash or screen-print aesthetic with sharp contrast and graphic clarity. The style should evoke Art Nouveau and Japanese Ukiyo-e woodblock prints, combining mythical grace with modern geometric elements. The overall mood is mysterious, powerful, and elegant. Full body, full view, suitable for apparel printing.
